# BuildGDI

This directory contains `buildgdi.exe`, the command-line GDIBuilder tool used by OpenMenu GDEMU Manager to rebuild Dreamcast GDI/openMenu menu images.

- Tool: BuildGDI v2.1.1
- Author/project: Sappharad / GDIbuilder
- Source repository: https://github.com/Sappharad/GDIbuilder
- Official tool page: https://projects.sappharad.com/tools/
- Bundled file: `buildgdi.exe`
- Expected SHA256: `52C0B7388DEFF46652F35F3F26AC8D2E6B29720E06BD7EDE450DAA0DFF0A8C5E`

`DiscUtilsGD`, the library used by GDIbuilder for Dreamcast/GD-ROM image handling, is distributed under the MIT license. The license text is included in this directory as `LICENSE-DiscUtilsGD.txt`.

This tool is bundled for user convenience and reproducible menu rebuilds. GDIbuilder/buildgdi remains the work of its original author(s). OpenMenu GDEMU Manager is not affiliated with or endorsed by the GDIbuilder project.
